message:
Update FNP-P2C-007 RaptorQ parity evidence and add RNG e2e scenarios

Conformance evidence updates:
- Regenerate parity_report.raptorq.json with expanded RaptorQ codec
  test coverage (+28000 lines of detailed encode/decode parity data)
- Update final_evidence_pack.json with current evidence summary
- Refresh packet_readiness_report.json, parity_report.json, and
  parity_report.decode_proof.json with updated metrics
- Update scrub_report.json with latest scrub results

New RNG end-to-end scenario artifacts:
- Add workflow_scenario_packet007_e2e_rng.jsonl with 188 RNG-specific
  end-to-end test scenario entries
- Add workflow_scenario_packet007_opt_e2e_rng.jsonl with optimized
  RNG test scenario variants
- Update artifact index files and reliability reports
- Update e2e JSONL files with expanded test entries

Source updates:
- Refine generate_packet007_final_evidence_pack.rs binary to produce
  updated evidence pack format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
